page_content:
Prerequisite: GEOL341, GEOL342, and GEOL451; or permission of CMNS- Geology department.

Restriction: Non-degree-seeking students require the permission of the instructor.

Credit Only Granted for. GEOL490 or GEOL491.

GEOL497 Recent Advances: Geology (3 Credits)

A survey of important recent advances in geological sciences in the context of the methods and practices of scientific research. Prerequisite: Must have completed at least 2 upper-level GEOL courses. Corequisite: GEOL393; and a third upper-level geology course. Restriction: Must be in Geology program; and GPA of 3.0 or better in both overall and in all courses required for the major; and senior standing; and to be taken as late as possible in the program.

Credit Only Granted for. GEOL497 or GEOL489H.
